name: frame-runtime-voiceover-narration
description: Frame-runtime port of SlideMotion's voiceover-narration — text + SVG waveform viz over timed narration segments, optional <FrameAudio> for playback sync (T-131e.2).

props.text: Welcome to our Q4 review. Revenue grew fifteen percent year over year. Customer retention hit a new high.
props.speaker: Ada
props.title: Chapter 1
